scripts.playground: set CONFIGURADOR_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/configurador_test && set NODE_ENV=test && cd servicos-global/configurador && npx tsx watch server/index.ts
scripts.db:migrate:dev: npm run db:compose && npx prisma migrate dev --schema=configurador/prisma/schema.prisma && npx prisma migrate dev --schema=servicos-global/tenant/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate:deploy: npx prisma migrate deploy --schema=configurador/prisma/schema.prisma && npx prisma migrate deploy --schema=servicos-global/tenant/prisma/schema.prisma
